mapper.insert: INSERT INTO security_lights ( sn, fclt_type, fclt_cd, fclt_gvmnfc_nm, addr, road_nm_addr, stdg_ctpv_cd, stdg_sgg_cd, stdg_emd_cd, location ) VALUES ( #{sn}, #{fcltType}, #{fcltCd}, #{fcltGvmnfcNm}, #{addr}, #{roadNmAddr}, #{stdgCtpvCd}, #{stdgSggCd}, #{stdgEmdCd}, ST_GeomFromText(#{locationWkt}, 4326) ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE fclt_type = VALUES(fclt_type), fclt_gvmnfc_nm = VALUES(fclt_gvmnfc_nm), addr = VALUES(addr), road_nm_addr = VALUES(road_nm_addr), location = VALUES(location);
